series_metadata.series_title: Agenda of Board Meeting: Public Copy for Pre-Meet
series_metadata.series_description: Outline of topics to be addressed at Board Meetings, with related materials [see retention schedule for Agenda of Board Meeting, EXE-0002], but excluding not yet approved, thus confidential, notices of opportunity for hearing, consent agreements, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: related Board meeting concluded ; Electronic: permanently
